summary: The buildx bake job failed because a wget command to download a nydus release returned HTTP 502/Bad Gateway and exited non‑zero, causing the build to fail.
root_cause: A network fetch failed: wget returned "HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway" when attempting to download the nydus release, and the wget command exited with code 1 which caused buildx to fail the solve.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Shows the wget download encountered a 502 Bad Gateway from the remote server.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: The failing command and the fact it exited with a non-zero code, which is reported as the reason buildx solve failed.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get "https://cdn01.quay.io/...": context canceled
evidence.reason: Additional evidence that remote fetches during the build experienced network/request errors (context canceled).

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: CI runner reports the buildx bake job failed directly because of the wget command failure.

suggested_fix: Retry the job (transient 502 errors often succeed on retry). If failures persist, verify the GitHub release URL for $NYDUS_VERSION is reachable and the artifact exists; consider pre-downloading/vendoring the nydus artifact or adding retry/backoff logic or caching to the build to avoid transient network failures.
